containerId.description: Unique identifier for the container this draggable belongs to

index.description: Index of the item in the container

item.description: The actual item data being dragged

id.description: Optional unique identifier for the item

itemType.description: Type of the draggable item (used for drop validation)

args.description: Additional arguments to pass along with drag data

canDrag.description: Whether the item can be dragged

onRemove.type: (source: { index: number; id?: string | number }, dropResult: DropResult | null) => void
onRemove.description: Callback when item is removed from its original container

draggingClassName.description: Extra CSS classes applied only while the item is being dragged

hideDefaultPreview.description: Hide the default browser drag preview (useful for custom overlays)

children.description: Children can be ReactNode or render prop function

accept.description: Type(s) of draggable items this droppable accepts

args.description: Additional arguments to pass to drop handler

onDrop.description: Callback when an item is dropped

onHover.description: Callback when a draggable item hovers over this droppable

dropIndicator.description: Built-in visual indicator style for drop targets

linePosition.description: Where to render the insertion line when dropIndicator='line'

children.description: Children can be ReactNode or render prop function
